chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text:
(a) The board shall carefully consider each application submitted under Section 69.035 (Application for License or Certificate) and shall conduct any investigation it considers necessary to determine whether an applicant is qualified for a license or certificate.

(b) As part of its consideration under Subsection (a), the board may develop and administer standardized examinations to determine an applicant’s knowledge of piloting, management of vessels, and the waterways in the board’s jurisdiction.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.036 — Consideration of Application

(a) The board shall carefully consider each application submitted under Section 69.035 (Application for License or Certificate) and shall conduct any investigation it considers necessary to determine whether an applicant is qualified for a license or certificate.

(b) As part of its consideration under Subsection (a), the board may develop and administer standardized examinations to determine an applicant’s knowledge of piloting, management of vessels, and the waterways in the board’s jurisdiction.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The board shall carefully consider each application submitted under Section 69.035 (Application for License or Certificate) and shall conduct any investigation it considers necessary to determine whether an applicant is qualified for a license or certificate.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: As part of its consideration under Subsection (a), the board may develop and administer standardized examinations to determine an applicant’s knowledge of piloting, management of vessels, and the waterways in the board’s jurisdiction.
